type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: A decrease in fuel use and changes to allocation of fuel to the various compressor units has reduced the amount of NOx emitted.

comments.comment: A decrease in fuel use and changes to allocation of fuel to the various compressor units has reduced the amount of CO emitted.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The remaining engines on site have now been equipped with low NOx controls.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: NOx emissions have decreased due to a switch from generic emissions factors to manufactures factors. This is despite a significant increase in fuel use.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: CO emissions have increased because there was a significant increase in the amount of fuel use. This is partially off-set by a change from generic emission factors to manufacturers factors.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: PM10 emissions have decreased due to a switch from generic emissions factors to manufactures factors. This is despite a significant increase in fuel use.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: PM2.5 emissions have decreased due to a switch from generic emissions factors to manufactures factors. This is despite a significant increase in fuel use.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: VOC emissions have increased due to increased fuel use and a switch from generic emissions factors to manufactures factors.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: One of the compressor engines located at the site was upgrade to a lower NOx design in March of 2008.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: One of the compressor engines located at the site was upgrade to a lower NOx design in March of 2008. This also reduced PM emissions.

comments.comment: One of the compressor engines located at the site was upgrade to a lower NOx design in March of 2008. This also reduced PM emissions.
